BulkInventoryImport._comment: Topic-level override example: a fresh bulk-import consumer group here intentionally skips any historical backlog rather than inheriting the Kafka-level Earliest.

_comment: CosmosDb:EmulatorKey, Nexus:Deduplication:ClientSecret, Kafka:Username/Kafka:Password, and Kafka:SchemaRegistryApiKey/Kafka:SchemaRegistryApiSecret are never set here - they come from `dotnet user-secrets` per cosmos-db.instructions.md §1. ServiceBus:ConnectionString and BlobStorage:Hot/Cold:AccountUri are set directly above (not user-secrets) instead: the Service Bus emulator's SharedAccessKey (generated once, kept in sync with scripts/local-emulators/config/service-bus-config.json's Credentials:ServiceBus:SharedAccessKey) is never actually validated - UseDevelopmentEmulator=true bypasses real SAS signature checks - and both BlobStorage AccountKey values are Azurite's own well-known key (the same one on every machine, addressed to the 'iiswmshotstore'/'iiswmscoldstore' custom accounts declared in scripts/local-emulators/config/storage-config.json); neither is a value derived from a real credential, same treatment as CosmosDb:AccountEndpoint. Kafka:AuthenticationMode (e.g. 'ScramSha512') and the Schema Registry API key/secret are only needed once talking to a real (SaslSsl) cluster/registry - not set here since the local emulator uses Plaintext and an unauthenticated registry. Nexus:Deduplication:Enabled and Nexus:Deduplication:AppId no longer exist - use Kafka:DeduplicationCheckEnabled and Application:AppId instead.
